name: Shrimp Pizza Wedges
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Shredded cheddar or Monterey Jack cheese (4-ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil; add shrimp, and cook 3 to 5 minutes or until shrimp turn pink. Drain well; rinse with cold water.
2. Chill the shrimp.
3. Peel and devein the shrimp.
4. Combine the shrimp and lemon juice; cover and chill for 30 minutes.
5. Process the chilled shrimp mixture, cream cheese, and the remaining ingredients (green onions, jalapeno peppers, garlic, cilantro, cumin, chili powder) in a food processor until smooth, scraping down sides occasionally.
6. Place tortillas on baking sheets; spread about 1/4 cup of shrimp mixture on each tortilla.
7. Bake at 350 degrees for 8 to 10 minutes or until edges begin to brown.
8. Cut each tortilla into 8 wedges. Garnish with whole shrimp or fresh cilantro sprigs, if desired.
